text:
TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 
OT header 

VALUES: Date (numeric, system dependent) 

COMMENT: For services involving multiple encounters on different days, or periods of care extending over two or 
more days, the date on which the service covered by this claim ended. 

The service end date (SRVC_END_DT) is a key partitioning field for the CCW data files. To be included 
in a RIF, each claim must have a SRVC_END_DT;
